_instructions: Structured dossier template (optional; an alternative to the .md files). Fill in the fields between <...>. Each answer or document becomes one 'sources' entry with its provenance ('kind'): document | technician | end_user | other. Add as many 'sources' as you need. Do not include personal data. Delete this '_instructions' field before delivering if you like.
domain: <domain / what it is used for, no personal data>
summary: <brief summary of the system and how it interacts with its user>

sources.label: Technical sheet / model card
sources.content: <text or summary of the document. E.g.: 'Classifies X into high/medium/low. Accuracy 0.82. No per-subgroup performance reported.'>

sources.label: Technical owner
sources.content: <what the technical profile reports about how the interaction works and was designed>

sources.label: End user
sources.content: <how the end user experiences the system: what they see, whether they trust it, what they do when they disagree>
